title: Fourths
description: Practice dividing shapes into 4 equal sections.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which picture divides a rectangle into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
You can divide a whole into $4$ equal parts.

The equal parts are called **fourths**.

This rectangle is divided into fourths.

![A rectangle with a horizontal and  vertical line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78005f7974e878ad30edef6d828d1372.png)  

It has $4$ equal parts.

choices.content: ![A rectangle with a horizontal line dividing it in 2 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/eeab7ebb03a60a071f24273832755b2a.png)
![A rectangle with a diagonal line from the top left corner to the bottom right corner dividing it into 2 parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b0fcafbbd1ba77e6771747a2657e5b5e.png)
![A rectangle with a horizontal and  vertical line dividing it into 4 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78005f7974e878ad30edef6d828d1372.png)
![A rectangle with 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3e1bdc85156ba3b5cfc7e6f806f4177b.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which picture divides a circle into fourths?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
You can divide a whole into $4$ equal parts.

The equal parts are called **fourths**.

This circle is divided into fourths.

It has $4$ equal parts.

![A circle with lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ffaae70d9e83dbc8f3e96fb0b2c8e983.png)

assessment_items.question_content:

The equal parts are called **fourths**.

This square is divided into fourths.

![A square.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/dc1e05d40b921e9b9ddeb556c5a555c5.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which picture divides a rectangle into quarters?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
You can divide a whole into $4$ equal parts.

The equal parts are called **quarters**.

This rectangle is divided into quarters.

![A rectangle with a vertical and a horizontal line dividing it into 4 smaller equal rectangles.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b97a3162384241911f686f7fed9ec90b.png)  
It has $4$ equal parts.

choices.content: ![A rectangle with 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7208db59d4e9a17e1f34c422f1cecfca.png)
![A rectangle with a vertical and a horizontal line dividing it into 4 smaller equal rectangles.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b97a3162384241911f686f7fed9ec90b.png)
![A rectangle with 1 vertical line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1565f751fffe6bbd0b519821393f43ab.png)
![A rectangle with 1 horizontal line dividing it into 2 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/eb6c81f67a623e2e22fc3610a1ee61f5.png)

assessment_items.question_content:

This circle is divided into quarters.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the rectangle divided into fourths?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/78005f7974e878ad30edef6d828d1372.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $4$ equal parts, it is divided into **fourths**, or quarters.



Is the rectangle divided into $4$ equal parts?
Yes, the rectangle is divided into fourths.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the rectangle divided into fourths?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2068f8d42ad44096c75541a02bba1c0c3f7f13bc)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $4$ equal parts, it is divided into **fourths**, or quarters.



Is the rectangle divided into $4$ equal parts?
No, the parts are not the same size.
No, the rectangle is **not** divided into quarters.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7208db59d4e9a17e1f34c422f1cecfca.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]

Is the rectangle divided into $4$ equal parts?
No, the rectangle is divided into $3$ equal parts.
No, the rectangle is **not** divided into quarters.
